response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is heavily focused on full-stack web development, DevOps, and open-source tooling, with no evidence of low-level hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated open-source contributions and technical leadership in tooling
Proven ability to deliver complex systems in distributed and real-time environments
concerns: No visible experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator hardware modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience
